title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.58.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | `v0.57.4` -> `v0.58.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.58.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.58.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.57.4/v0.58.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.57.4/v0.58.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.58.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.58.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.57.4...v0.58.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/image to v5.29.0, common to v0.57.0, and then v0.57.1-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1741](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1741)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20231116 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1742](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1742)
-   chore(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.10 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1743](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1743)
-   parse: support `no-dereference` mount option by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1747](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1747)
-   utils: use GetRuntimeDir() from c/storage by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1725](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1725)
-   Fix inspection of unsigned schema1 images by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1748](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1748)
-   refactor(machine): add applehv and hyperv host type  by [@​BlackHole1](https://togithub.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1749](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1749)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.15.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1751](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1751)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.15.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1752](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1752)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.16.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1753](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1753)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.13.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1755](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1755)
-   Add configurability to Netavark firewall driver by [@​cgiradkar](https://togithub.com/cgiradkar) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1750](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1750)
-   Prioritize addtionalHelperBinariesDir over default dirs by [@​ashley-cui](https://togithub.com/ashley-cui) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1754](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1754)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/containerd to v1.7.10 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1756](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1756)
-   Image copier: make sure ReportWriter is not nil before accessing by [@​ygalblum](https://togithub.com/ygalblum) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1758](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1758)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containernetworking/plugins to v1.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1760](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1760)
